intent: 2-STOREY 3BR squarish rear-stair smoke test on the canonical 10.5x10.5 lot, no carport. 6.5x6.5 envelope per floor (42.25 m² footprint, 84.5 m² gross — in the 3BR/2-bath 80-120 band). Completes the 2s {2BR,3BR} x {narrow,squarish,wide} matrix. Exercises the orientation-adaptive stair (vertical rear-corner run at this width; the same topology lays it sideways on 7 m-wide floors), master + br2 street-facing front with br3 rear, the five-door hall-core, and the three-layer master-supremacy guards (solver all-standards rule, snap cap, claimer guard) that this topology's authoring surfaced.
must_haves: master and second bedroom street-facing at the front
compact hall-core upstairs, not a corridor
full-width great room with dining counter
